title: Brand Agent Type
description: Functional roles for agents declared in brand.json. Each type represents a distinct capability that a brand or house can expose via an agent endpoint.

enumDescriptions.brand: Provides brand identity data (logos, colors, tone, guidelines) via MCP
enumDescriptions.rights: Handles rights discovery, pricing, and acquisition for licensable assets
enumDescriptions.measurement: Provides campaign measurement, attribution, and reporting services
enumDescriptions.governance: Enforces brand safety, compliance, and policy rules
enumDescriptions.creative: Manages creative asset generation, review, and approval
enumDescriptions.buying: Executes media buying on behalf of the brand
enumDescriptions.signals: Provides audience signal discovery and activation
